headline: Here's Why You Should Retain Ecolab Stock in Your Portfolio Now
summary: ECL's strong Q1 earnings, digital growth and expanding high-tech platform support long-term upside despite rising cost pressures.

headline: Ecolab pops as Citi sees improving setup into Q2 earnings
summary: Investing.com -- Water solutions firm Ecolab’s shares rose after Citi initiated a positive catalyst watch on the stock, citing an improving cost environment and pricing momentum heading into the second half of the year.
